commands.cmdDescription: Vincula eventos de teclado, mouse e sistema a widgets
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Eventos')
app.geometry('500x500')

log = ctk.CTkTextbox(app, height=200)
log.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

def add_log(msg):
    log.insert('end', msg + '\n')
    log.see('end')

# Exemplo 1: Eventos de teclado
def on_key(event):
    add_log(f'Tecla: {event.keysym} (char: {event.char})')

app.bind('<Key>', on_key)

# Exemplo 2: Teclas específicas
def on_enter(event):
    add_log('Enter pressionado!')

def on_escape(event):
    add_log('Escape pressionado!')
    # app.destroy()  # Fechar app com Escape

app.bind('<Return>', on_enter)
app.bind('<Escape>', on_escape)

# Exemplo 3: Combinações de teclas
def on_ctrl_s(event):
    add_log('Ctrl+S: Salvar!')

def on_ctrl_z(event):
    add_log('Ctrl+Z: Desfazer!')

app.bind('<Control-s>', on_ctrl_s)
app.bind('<Control-z>', on_ctrl_z)

# Exemplo 4: Eventos de mouse
frame = ctk.CTkFrame(app, width=400, height=100, fg_color='#3B8ED0')
frame.pack(pady=10, padx=20)
frame.pack_propagate(False)
label_frame = ctk.CTkLabel(frame, text='Passe o mouse aqui')
label_frame.pack(expand=True)

def on_mouse_enter(event):
    frame.configure(fg_color='#e94560')
    label_frame.configure(text='Mouse dentro!')

def on_mouse_leave(event):
    frame.configure(fg_color='#3B8ED0')
    label_frame.configure(text='Passe o mouse aqui')

def on_click(event):
    add_log(f'Clique em: x={event.x}, y={event.y}')

def on_right_click(event):
    add_log(f'Clique direito em: x={event.x}, y={event.y}')

def on_double_click(event):
    add_log('Duplo clique!')

frame.bind('<Enter>', on_mouse_enter)
frame.bind('<Leave>', on_mouse_leave)
frame.bind('<Button-1>', on_click)
frame.bind('<Button-3>', on_right_click)
frame.bind('<Double-Button-1>', on_double_click)

# Exemplo 5: Evento de redimensionamento
def on_resize(event):
    if event.widget == app:
        add_log(f'Janela: {event.width}x{event.height}')

app.bind('<Configure>', on_resize)

# Exemplo 6: Evento de fechar janela
def on_close():
    print('Janela sendo fechada!')
    app.destroy()

app.protocol('WM_DELETE_WINDOW', on_close)

# Exemplo 7: Entry com evento
entry = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Digite algo...')
entry.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

def on_entry_change(event):
    add_log(f'Entry: {entry.get()}')

entry.bind('<KeyRelease>', on_entry_change)

# Eventos comuns:
# <Button-1>: clique esquerdo
# <Button-3>: clique direito
# <Double-Button-1>: duplo clique
# <Enter>: mouse entra no widget
# <Leave>: mouse sai do widget
# <Key>: qualquer tecla
# <Return>: Enter
# <Escape>: Escape
# <Control-s>: Ctrl+S
# <Configure>: redimensionamento
# <FocusIn>: widget ganha foco
# <FocusOut>: widget perde foco
# <MouseWheel>: scroll do mouse

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com textbox de log, frame azul e entry)
(Digitando 'a': log mostra 'Tecla: a (char: a)')
(Pressionando Enter: log mostra 'Enter pressionado!')
(Ctrl+S: log mostra 'Ctrl+S: Salvar!')
(Mouse sobre frame: frame fica vermelho, texto muda)
(Mouse sai do frame: volta ao azul)
(Clique no frame: log mostra 'Clique em: x=150, y=45')
(Duplo clique: log mostra 'Duplo clique!')
(Redimensionar: log mostra 'Janela: 600x500')
(Fechar janela: imprime 'Janela sendo fechada!')

commands.cmdName: Erro: TclError - bad window path name
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao tentar acessar widget já destruído ou janela fechada
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Erro TclError')
app.geometry('400x300')

# Exemplo 1: Widget destruído
label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Texto')
label.pack()
label.destroy()

try:
    label.configure(text='Novo texto')  # Widget já destruído
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Erro 1: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: Toplevel fechado
def open_and_access():
    top = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    top.title('Temporária')
    lbl = ctk.CTkLabel(top, text='Temporário')
    lbl.pack()
    top.destroy()  # Fechar janela
    
    try:
        lbl.configure(text='Teste')  # Tentar acessar widget na janela destruída
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Erro 2: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Testar', command=open_and_access).pack(pady=20)

# Exemplo 3: Verificar se widget existe
def safe_configure(widget, **kwargs):
    try:
        if widget.winfo_exists():
            widget.configure(**kwargs)
            print('Widget configurado com sucesso')
        else:
            print('Widget não existe mais')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Erro: {e}')

# Exemplo 4: Causas comuns e soluções
print('\nCausas comuns de TclError:')
print('  1. Widget já foi destruído com .destroy()')
print('  2. Janela pai foi fechada')
print('  3. Referência a widget em callback após destruição')
print('  4. Thread tentando acessar widget da UI')
print('\nSoluções:')
print('  1. Verificar com .winfo_exists() antes de acessar')
print('  2. Usar try/except ao redor de operações em widgets')
print('  3. Usar app.after() para operações da thread principal')
print('  4. Setar referências como None após destroy()')

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Erro 1: TclError: bad window path name ".!ctklabel"
Erro 2: TclError: bad window path name ".!ctktoplevel.!ctklabel"
Widget não existe mais

Causas comuns de TclError:
  1. Widget já foi destruído com .destroy()
  2. Janela pai foi fechada
  3. Referência a widget em callback após destruição
  4. Thread tentando acessar widget da UI

Soluções:
  1. Verificar com .winfo_exists() antes de acessar
  2. Usar try/except ao redor de operações em widgets
  3. Usar app.after() para operações da thread principal
  4. Setar referências como None após destroy()

commands.cmdName: Erro: RuntimeError - main thread is not in main loop
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao atualizar widgets de uma thread secundária
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk
import threading
import time

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Threading Error')
app.geometry('400x300')

label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Status: Aguardando', font=('Arial', 16))
label.pack(pady=20)

progress = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
progress.set(0)

# Exemplo 1: ERRO - Atualizar widget de thread secundária
def wrong_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            try:
                # ERRADO: atualizar widget da thread secundária
                label.configure(text=f'Progresso: {i}%')
                progress.set(i / 100)
            except RuntimeError as e:
                print(f'Erro: {e}')
                break
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task).start()

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - Usar app.after()
def correct_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            # CORRETO: agendar atualização na thread principal
            app.after(0, lambda v=i: label.configure(text=f'Progresso: {v}%'))
            app.after(0, lambda v=i: progress.set(v / 100))
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()

# Exemplo 3: CORRETO - Usar queue
import queue

msg_queue = queue.Queue()

def process_queue():
    try:
        while True:
            msg = msg_queue.get_nowait()
            label.configure(text=msg)
    except queue.Empty:
        pass
    app.after(100, process_queue)  # Verificar a cada 100ms

def queue_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            msg_queue.put(f'Progresso: {i}%')
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()

process_queue()  # Iniciar processamento

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Errado (Thread)', command=wrong_thread_update, fg_color='#e94560').pack(pady=5)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Correto (after)', command=correct_thread_update, fg_color='#2ecc71').pack(pady=5)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Correto (Queue)', command=queue_thread_update, fg_color='#2ecc71').pack(pady=5)

print('\nSoluções para threading:')
print('  1. app.after(ms, callback) - agenda na thread principal')
print('  2. queue.Queue - fila thread-safe')
print('  3. Nunca chamar .configure() de thread secundária')
print('  4. Usar daemon=True para threads que devem encerrar com app')

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Soluções para threading:
  1. app.after(ms, callback) - agenda na thread principal
  2. queue.Queue - fila thread-safe
  3. Nunca chamar .configure() de thread secundária
  4. Usar daemon=True para threads que devem encerrar com app

(Botão vermelho: causa RuntimeError ao tentar atualizar da thread)
(Botão verde 'after': atualiza label e progress suavemente)
(Botão verde 'Queue': atualiza via fila thread-safe)
Erro: main thread is not in main loop

commands.cmdDescription: Cria janela principal com suporte a menu, toolbar, statusbar e widget central
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget,
                              QLabel, QVBoxLayout, QMenuBar, QToolBar,
                              QStatusBar)
from PyQt6.QtGui import QAction, QIcon
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)

# Exemplo 1: MainWindow básica
class MainWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('MainWindow')
        self.setGeometry(100, 100, 800, 600)
        
        # Widget central obrigatório
        central = QWidget()
        self.setCentralWidget(central)
        
        layout = QVBoxLayout(central)
        layout.addWidget(QLabel('Conteúdo Central'))

window = MainWindow()
window.show()

# Exemplo 2: MainWindow com menu, toolbar e statusbar
class FullWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('App Completa')
        self.setGeometry(100, 100, 800, 600)
        
        # Menu Bar
        menu_bar = self.menuBar()
        file_menu = menu_bar.addMenu('&Arquivo')
        
        new_action = QAction('&Novo', self)
        new_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+N')
        new_action.triggered.connect(lambda: print('Novo arquivo'))
        file_menu.addAction(new_action)
        
        open_action = QAction('&Abrir', self)
        open_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+O')
        open_action.triggered.connect(lambda: print('Abrir arquivo'))
        file_menu.addAction(open_action)
        
        file_menu.addSeparator()
        
        exit_action = QAction('&Sair', self)
        exit_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+Q')
        exit_action.triggered.connect(self.close)
        file_menu.addAction(exit_action)
        
        edit_menu = menu_bar.addMenu('&Editar')
        edit_menu.addAction('Copiar')
        edit_menu.addAction('Colar')
        
        # Tool Bar
        toolbar = QToolBar('Barra Principal')
        self.addToolBar(toolbar)
        toolbar.addAction(new_action)
        toolbar.addAction(open_action)
        toolbar.addSeparator()
        toolbar.addAction(exit_action)
        
        # Status Bar
        self.statusBar().showMessage('Pronto', 3000)  # 3 segundos
        
        # Widget Central
        central = QWidget()
        self.setCentralWidget(central)
        layout = QVBoxLayout(central)
        layout.addWidget(QLabel('Área de trabalho principal'))

window = FullWindow()
window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com barra de menu: Arquivo | Editar)
(Menu Arquivo: Novo (Ctrl+N), Abrir (Ctrl+O), separador, Sair (Ctrl+Q))
(Toolbar com ícones de Novo, Abrir, separador, Sair)
(StatusBar mostra 'Pronto' por 3 segundos)
(Clicar Novo imprime: Novo arquivo)
(Clicar Abrir imprime: Abrir arquivo)

import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton, QVBoxLayout
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, QSize
from PyQt6.QtGui import QIcon, QFont

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Botões')
window.resize(400, 600)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Botão básico
btn1 = QPushButton('Clique Aqui')
btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Botão 1 clicado!'))
layout.addWidget(btn1)

# Exemplo 2: Botão com método
def on_click():
    print('Botão 2 clicado!')

btn2 = QPushButton('Com Função')
btn2.clicked.connect(on_click)
layout.addWidget(btn2)

# Exemplo 3: Botão com tamanho fixo
btn3 = QPushButton('Tamanho Fixo')
btn3.setFixedSize(200, 50)
layout.addWidget(btn3)

# Exemplo 4: Botão com ícone
# btn4 = QPushButton('Com Ícone')
# btn4.setIcon(QIcon('icon.png'))
# btn4.setIconSize(QSize(24, 24))
# layout.addWidget(btn4)

# Exemplo 5: Botão estilizado com CSS
btn5 = QPushButton('Estilizado')
btn5.setStyleSheet('''
    QPushButton {
        background-color: #e94560;
        color: white;
        border: none;
        padding: 12px 24px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    QPushButton:hover {
        background-color: #c0392b;
    }
    QPushButton:pressed {
        background-color: #a93226;
    }
    QPushButton:disabled {
        background-color: #bdc3c7;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(btn5)

# Exemplo 6: Botão desabilitado
btn6 = QPushButton('Desabilitado')
btn6.setEnabled(False)
layout.addWidget(btn6)

# Exemplo 7: Botão toggle (checkable)
btn7 = QPushButton('Toggle ON/OFF')
btn7.setCheckable(True)
btn7.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Toggle: {"ON" if checked else "OFF"}'))
layout.addWidget(btn7)

# Exemplo 8: Botão com fonte grande
btn8 = QPushButton('Fonte Grande')
btn8.setFont(QFont('Helvetica', 18, QFont.Weight.Bold))
layout.addWidget(btn8)

# Exemplo 9: Botão com tooltip
btn9 = QPushButton('Com Tooltip')
btn9.setToolTip('Este é um botão com dica de ferramenta')
layout.addWidget(btn9)

# Exemplo 10: Botão com shortcut
btn10 = QPushButton('&Atalho (Alt+A)')
btn10.setShortcut('Ctrl+Return')
btn10.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Atalho ativado!'))
layout.addWidget(btn10)

# Exemplo 11: Alterar texto em runtime
btn11 = QPushButton('Original')
counter = [0]
def increment():
    counter[0] += 1
    btn11.setText(f'Clicado {counter[0]}x')
btn11.clicked.connect(increment)
layout.addWidget(btn11)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QGridLayout,
                              QPushButton, QLabel, QLineEdit)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('GridLayout')

# Exemplo 1: Grid básico
grid = QGridLayout()

# addWidget(widget, row, col)
grid.addWidget(QLabel('Nome:'), 0, 0)
grid.addWidget(QLineEdit(), 0, 1)

grid.addWidget(QLabel('Email:'), 1, 0)
grid.addWidget(QLineEdit(), 1, 1)

grid.addWidget(QLabel('Senha:'), 2, 0)
edit_senha = QLineEdit()
edit_senha.setEchoMode(QLineEdit.EchoMode.Password)
grid.addWidget(edit_senha, 2, 1)

# Exemplo 2: Widget ocupando múltiplas colunas (colspan)
# addWidget(widget, row, col, rowspan, colspan)
grid.addWidget(QPushButton('Enviar (colspan=2)'), 3, 0, 1, 2)

# Exemplo 3: Calculadora (grid perfeito)
calc_grid = QGridLayout()
botoes = [
    ['7', '8', '9', '/'],
    ['4', '5', '6', '*'],
    ['1', '2', '3', '-'],
    ['0', '.', '=', '+']
]

for row, linha in enumerate(botoes):
    for col, texto in enumerate(linha):
        btn = QPushButton(texto)
        btn.setFixedSize(60, 40)
        calc_grid.addWidget(btn, row, col)

# Exemplo 4: Layout com espaçamento
grid.setSpacing(10)
grid.setContentsMargins(15, 15, 15, 15)

# Exemplo 5: Stretch de colunas
grid.setColumnStretch(1, 1)  # Coluna 1 expande

# Combinar layouts
main = QGridLayout()
main.addLayout(grid, 0, 0)
main.addLayout(calc_grid, 1, 0)

window.setLayout(main)
window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria caixa de seleção com estados marcado, desmarcado e parcial
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QCheckBox,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('CheckBox')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: CheckBox básico
cb1 = QCheckBox('Aceito os termos')
layout.addWidget(cb1)

# Exemplo 2: CheckBox com callback
def on_check(state):
    if state == Qt.CheckState.Checked.value:
        print('Marcado!')
    else:
        print('Desmarcado!')

cb2 = QCheckBox('Com callback')
cb2.stateChanged.connect(on_check)
layout.addWidget(cb2)

# Exemplo 3: CheckBox pré-selecionado
cb3 = QCheckBox('Pré-marcado')
cb3.setChecked(True)
layout.addWidget(cb3)

# Exemplo 4: CheckBox com três estados
cb4 = QCheckBox('Três estados')
cb4.setTristate(True)
cb4.setCheckState(Qt.CheckState.PartiallyChecked)
layout.addWidget(cb4)

# Exemplo 5: CheckBox desabilitado
cb5 = QCheckBox('Desabilitado')
cb5.setEnabled(False)
cb5.setChecked(True)
layout.addWidget(cb5)

# Exemplo 6: CheckBox estilizado
cb6 = QCheckBox('Estilizado')
cb6.setStyleSheet('''
    QCheckBox {
        font-size: 16px;
        spacing: 10px;
    }
    QCheckBox::indicator {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
    }
    QCheckBox::indicator:checked {
        background-color: #e94560;
        border: 2px solid #e94560;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(cb6)

# Exemplo 7: Obter valores
def show_values():
    print(f'cb1: {cb1.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb2: {cb2.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb3: {cb3.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb4 state: {cb4.checkState()}')

btn = QPushButton('Mostrar Valores')
btn.clicked.connect(show_values)
layout.addWidget(btn)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botão de opção para seleção mutuamente exclusiva
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QRadioButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QGroupBox, QPushButton,
                              QButtonGroup)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('RadioButton')
window.resize(300, 400)
main_layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Radio buttons em grupo visual
group_box1 = QGroupBox('Tamanho')
group_layout1 = QVBoxLayout()

rb1 = QRadioButton('Pequeno')
rb2 = QRadioButton('Médio')
rb3 = QRadioButton('Grande')
rb2.setChecked(True)  # Selecionado por padrão

group_layout1.addWidget(rb1)
group_layout1.addWidget(rb2)
group_layout1.addWidget(rb3)
group_box1.setLayout(group_layout1)
main_layout.addWidget(group_box1)

# Exemplo 2: Segundo grupo independente
group_box2 = QGroupBox('Cor')
group_layout2 = QVBoxLayout()

rb4 = QRadioButton('Vermelho')
rb5 = QRadioButton('Verde')
rb6 = QRadioButton('Azul')
rb4.setChecked(True)

group_layout2.addWidget(rb4)
group_layout2.addWidget(rb5)
group_layout2.addWidget(rb6)
group_box2.setLayout(group_layout2)
main_layout.addWidget(group_box2)

# Exemplo 3: QButtonGroup para controle programático
bt_group = QButtonGroup()
bt_group.addButton(rb1, 1)  # id = 1
bt_group.addButton(rb2, 2)  # id = 2
bt_group.addButton(rb3, 3)  # id = 3

def on_button_clicked(button):
    print(f'Selecionado: {button.text()} (id={bt_group.id(button)})')

bt_group.buttonClicked.connect(on_button_clicked)

# Exemplo 4: Com callback
rb4.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Vermelho: {checked}') if checked else None)
rb5.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Verde: {checked}') if checked else None)
rb6.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Azul: {checked}') if checked else None)

# Exemplo 5: Obter seleção
def show_selection():
    for rb in [rb1, rb2, rb3]:
        if rb.isChecked():
            print(f'Tamanho: {rb.text()}')
    for rb in [rb4, rb5, rb6]:
        if rb.isChecked():
            print(f'Cor: {rb.text()}')
    print(f'Checked ID: {bt_group.checkedId()}')

btn = QPushButton('Mostrar Seleção')
btn.clicked.connect(show_selection)
main_layout.addWidget(btn)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

(Clicar Grande imprime: Selecionado: Grande (id=3))
(Clicar Verde imprime: Verde: True)
(Botão imprime: Tamanho: Médio, Cor: Vermelho, Checked ID: 2)

window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ComboBox')

cb1 = QComboBox()

# Exemplo 7: Manipular itens

commands.cmdDescription: Cria controle deslizante para seleção de valores numéricos
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QSlider,
                              QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Slider')
window.resize(400, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Slider horizontal
slider1 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider1.setMinimum(0)
slider1.setMaximum(100)
slider1.setValue(50)
layout.addWidget(slider1)

# Exemplo 2: Slider com label de valor
label2 = QLabel('Valor: 50')
label2.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter)
layout.addWidget(label2)

slider2 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider2.setRange(0, 100)
slider2.setValue(50)
slider2.valueChanged.connect(lambda v: label2.setText(f'Valor: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(slider2)

# Exemplo 3: Slider com ticks (marcações)
slider3 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider3.setRange(0, 100)
slider3.setTickPosition(QSlider.TickPosition.TicksBelow)
slider3.setTickInterval(10)
slider3.setSingleStep(5)  # Step com setas
slider3.setPageStep(20)  # Step com Page Up/Down
layout.addWidget(slider3)

# Exemplo 4: Slider vertical
h_layout = QHBoxLayout()

for i in range(3):
    v_slider = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Vertical)
    v_slider.setRange(0, 100)
    v_slider.setValue(30 * (i + 1))
    v_slider.setFixedHeight(150)
    h_layout.addWidget(v_slider)

layout.addLayout(h_layout)

# Exemplo 5: Slider estilizado
slider5 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider5.setRange(0, 100)
slider5.setValue(70)
slider5.setStyleSheet('''
    QSlider::groove:horizontal {
        border: 1px solid #999;
        height: 8px;
        background: #2d3436;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
    QSlider::handle:horizontal {
        background: #e94560;
        border: none;
        width: 20px;
        margin: -6px 0;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }
    QSlider::sub-page:horizontal {
        background: #e94560;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(slider5)

# Exemplo 6: Eventos específicos
slider6 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider6.setRange(0, 100)
slider6.sliderPressed.connect(lambda: print('Slider pressionado'))
slider6.sliderReleased.connect(lambda: print(f'Solto em: {slider6.value()}'))
slider6.sliderMoved.connect(lambda v: print(f'Movendo: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(slider6)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria barra de progresso com valor determinado ou indeterminado
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QProgressBar,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QTimer

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ProgressBar')
window.resize(400, 300)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: ProgressBar básica
pb1 = QProgressBar()
pb1.setValue(75)
layout.addWidget(pb1)

# Exemplo 2: ProgressBar com range customizado
pb2 = QProgressBar()
pb2.setRange(0, 1000)
pb2.setValue(450)
pb2.setFormat('%v / %m (%p%)')  # valor / máximo (percentual%)
layout.addWidget(pb2)

# Exemplo 3: ProgressBar indeterminada
pb3 = QProgressBar()
pb3.setRange(0, 0)  # Range 0,0 = indeterminada
layout.addWidget(pb3)

# Exemplo 4: ProgressBar com animação via Timer
pb4 = QProgressBar()
pb4.setRange(0, 100)
pb4.setValue(0)
layout.addWidget(pb4)

timer = QTimer()
progress_value = [0]

def update_progress():
    progress_value[0] += 1
    pb4.setValue(progress_value[0])
    if progress_value[0] >= 100:
        timer.stop()
        print('Progresso completo!')

timer.timeout.connect(update_progress)

def start_progress():
    progress_value[0] = 0
    pb4.setValue(0)
    timer.start(50)  # Atualiza a cada 50ms

btn_start = QPushButton('Iniciar Progresso')
btn_start.clicked.connect(start_progress)
layout.addWidget(btn_start)

# Exemplo 5: ProgressBar estilizada
pb5 = QProgressBar()
pb5.setValue(60)
pb5.setStyleSheet('''
    QProgressBar {
        border: 2px solid #2d3436;
        border-radius: 8px;
        text-align: center;
        font-weight: bold;
        background-color: #2d3436;
        color: white;
        height: 25px;
    }
    QProgressBar::chunk {
        background-color: #e94560;
        border-radius: 6px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(pb5)

# Exemplo 6: ProgressBar sem texto
pb6 = QProgressBar()
pb6.setValue(40)
pb6.setTextVisible(False)
layout.addWidget(pb6)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com barras de progresso)
(pb1: barra azul em 75%, texto '75%')
(pb2: barra mostra '450 / 1000 (45%)')
(pb3: barra animada indeterminada pulsando)
(pb4: barra inicia em 0%, botão anima até 100%)
(Ao completar imprime: Progresso completo!)
(pb5: barra vermelha com fundo escuro e cantos arredondados)
(pb6: barra sem texto visível)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria diálogos de mensagem padrão (informação, aviso, erro, confirmação)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QMessageBox)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('MessageBox')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Informação
def show_info():
    QMessageBox.information(window, 'Informação', 'Operação concluída com sucesso!')
    print('Info fechada')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Informação', clicked=show_info))

# Exemplo 2: Aviso
def show_warning():
    QMessageBox.warning(window, 'Aviso', 'Atenção! Dados podem ser perdidos.')
    print('Aviso fechado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Aviso', clicked=show_warning))

# Exemplo 3: Erro
def show_error():
    QMessageBox.critical(window, 'Erro', 'Falha ao conectar com o servidor!')
    print('Erro fechado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Erro', clicked=show_error))

# Exemplo 4: Pergunta com retorno
def show_question():
    reply = QMessageBox.question(
        window,
        'Confirmação',
        'Deseja realmente sair?',
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No,
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.No  # Padrão
    )
    if reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:
        print('Usuário clicou Sim')
    else:
        print('Usuário clicou Não')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Pergunta', clicked=show_question))

# Exemplo 5: Pergunta com 3 botões
def show_save_question():
    reply = QMessageBox.question(
        window,
        'Salvar',
        'Deseja salvar as alterações?',
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Save |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Discard |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel
    )
    if reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Save:
        print('Salvar')
    elif reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Discard:
        print('Descartar')
    else:
        print('Cancelar')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Salvar/Descartar', clicked=show_save_question))

# Exemplo 6: MessageBox personalizada
def show_custom():
    msg = QMessageBox(window)
    msg.setWindowTitle('Personalizada')
    msg.setText('Mensagem principal aqui.')
    msg.setInformativeText('Texto informativo adicional.')
    msg.setDetailedText('Detalhes técnicos:\nErro código: 42\nMódulo: database')
    msg.setIcon(QMessageBox.Icon.Warning)
    msg.setStandardButtons(
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel
    )
    msg.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
    
    result = msg.exec()
    if result == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
        print('OK clicado')
    else:
        print('Cancel clicado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Personalizada', clicked=show_custom))

# Exemplo 7: About
def show_about():
    QMessageBox.about(window, 'Sobre', 'Minha App v1.0\n\nDesenvolvido com PyQt6')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Sobre', clicked=show_about))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com 7 botões)
(Botão 'Informação': popup com ícone azul 'i', texto 'Operação concluída')
(Botão 'Aviso': popup com ícone amarelo '!', texto 'Atenção!')
(Botão 'Erro': popup com ícone vermelho 'X', texto 'Falha ao conectar')
(Botão 'Pergunta': popup com Sim/Não -> imprime 'Usuário clicou Sim')
(Botão 'Salvar/Descartar': 3 botões -> imprime ação escolhida)
(Botão 'Personalizada': popup com texto, info e detalhes expansíveis)
(Botão 'Sobre': popup simples com info da app)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria diálogos nativos para abrir, salvar e selecionar arquivos/pastas
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QFileDialog)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('FileDialog')
window.resize(400, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

label = QLabel('Nenhum arquivo selecionado')
label.setWordWrap(True)
layout.addWidget(label)

# Exemplo 1: Abrir arquivo único
def open_file():
    file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(
        window,
        'Abrir Arquivo',
        '',  # Diretório inicial
        'Todos (**);;Python (*.py);;Texto (*.txt);;Imagens (*.png *.jpg)'
    )
    if file_path:
        label.setText(f'Arquivo: {file_path}')
        print(f'Arquivo selecionado: {file_path}')
    else:
        print('Cancelado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Abrir Arquivo', clicked=open_file))

# Exemplo 2: Abrir múltiplos arquivos
def open_files():
    files, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileNames(
        window,
        'Abrir Arquivos',
        '',
        'Todos (**);;Python (*.py)'
    )
    if files:
        label.setText(f'Arquivos: {len(files)} selecionados\n{chr(10).join(files)}')
        print(f'Selecionados: {files}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Abrir Múltiplos', clicked=open_files))

# Exemplo 3: Salvar arquivo
def save_file():
    file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(
        window,
        'Salvar Arquivo',
        'documento.txt',  # Nome sugerido
        'Texto (*.txt);;Python (*.py);;Todos (*.*)'
    )
    if file_path:
        label.setText(f'Salvar em: {file_path}')
        print(f'Salvar em: {file_path}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Salvar Arquivo', clicked=save_file))

# Exemplo 4: Selecionar diretório
def select_dir():
    dir_path = QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory(
        window,
        'Selecionar Pasta',
        ''  # Diretório inicial
    )
    if dir_path:
        label.setText(f'Pasta: {dir_path}')
        print(f'Pasta: {dir_path}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Selecionar Pasta', clicked=select_dir))

# Exemplo 5: FileDialog personalizado
def custom_dialog():
    dialog = QFileDialog(window)
    dialog.setWindowTitle('Dialog Custom')
    dialog.setFileMode(QFileDialog.FileMode.ExistingFiles)
    dialog.setNameFilter('Imagens (*.png *.jpg *.gif);;Todos (*.*)')
    dialog.setViewMode(QFileDialog.ViewMode.Detail)
    dialog.setDirectory('/home')  # ou 'C:/' no Windows
    
    if dialog.exec():
        files = dialog.selectedFiles()
        label.setText(f'Custom: {files}')
        print(f'Custom: {files}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Dialog Custom', clicked=custom_dialog))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Sistema de comunicação entre objetos do PyQt6 (eventos e callbacks)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QLineEdit, QSlider)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, pyqtSignal, QObject

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Signals & Slots')
window.resize(400, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Signal básico (clicked)
btn1 = QPushButton('Clique (Signal básico)')
btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Signal clicked emitido!'))
layout.addWidget(btn1)

# Exemplo 2: Signal com parâmetro
slider = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider.setRange(0, 100)
label_slider = QLabel('Valor: 0')
slider.valueChanged.connect(lambda v: label_slider.setText(f'Valor: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(label_slider)
layout.addWidget(slider)

# Exemplo 3: Conectar signal a múltiplos slots
btn3 = QPushButton('Múltiplos Slots')
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 1 executado'))
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 2 executado'))
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 3 executado'))
layout.addWidget(btn3)

# Exemplo 4: Desconectar signal
btn4 = QPushButton('Conectado')
handler = lambda: print('Conectado!')
btn4.clicked.connect(handler)

def toggle_connection():
    try:
        btn4.clicked.disconnect(handler)
        btn4.setText('Desconectado')
        print('Signal desconectado')
    except TypeError:
        btn4.clicked.connect(handler)
        btn4.setText('Conectado')
        print('Signal reconectado')

btn_toggle = QPushButton('Toggle Conexão')
btn_toggle.clicked.connect(toggle_connection)
layout.addWidget(btn4)
layout.addWidget(btn_toggle)

# Exemplo 5: Signal customizado
class Worker(QObject):
    # Definir signals customizados
    started = pyqtSignal()
    progress = pyqtSignal(int)
    finished = pyqtSignal(str)
    error = pyqtSignal(str, int)  # mensagem, código
    
    def run(self):
        self.started.emit()
        for i in range(0, 101, 20):
            self.progress.emit(i)
        self.finished.emit('Concluído!')

worker = Worker()

label5 = QLabel('Worker: Idle')
layout.addWidget(label5)

worker.started.connect(lambda: label5.setText('Worker: Iniciado'))
worker.progress.connect(lambda v: label5.setText(f'Worker: {v}%'))
worker.finished.connect(lambda msg: label5.setText(f'Worker: {msg}'))
worker.error.connect(lambda msg, code: print(f'Erro: {msg} (código {code})'))

btn5 = QPushButton('Executar Worker')
btn5.clicked.connect(worker.run)
layout.addWidget(btn5)

# Exemplo 6: Signal entre widgets
edit6 = QLineEdit()
edit6.setPlaceholderText('Digite e veja abaixo...')
label6 = QLabel('Espelho: ')
edit6.textChanged.connect(lambda t: label6.setText(f'Espelho: {t}'))
layout.addWidget(edit6)
layout.addWidget(label6)

# Exemplo 7: Signal com método de classe
class MyWindow(QWidget):
    # Signal customizado
    data_changed = pyqtSignal(dict)
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.data_changed.connect(self.on_data_changed)
    
    def on_data_changed(self, data):
        print(f'Dados alterados: {data}')
    
    def update_data(self):
        self.data_changed.emit({'nome': 'João', 'idade': 30})

print('\nSignals mais comuns:')
print('  QPushButton: clicked, pressed, released, toggled')
print('  QLineEdit: textChanged, returnPressed, editingFinished')
print('  QSlider: valueChanged, sliderPressed, sliderReleased')
print('  QCheckBox: stateChanged, toggled')
print('  QComboBox: currentIndexChanged, currentTextChanged')
print('  QSpinBox: valueChanged')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

  QLineEdit: textChanged, returnPressed, editingFinished
  QSlider: valueChanged, sliderPressed, sliderReleased
  QCheckBox: stateChanged, toggled
  QComboBox: currentIndexChanged, currentTextChanged
  QSpinBox: valueChanged

commands.cmdDescription: Cria temporizador para executar ações periódicas ou com delay
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QTimer, QTime

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('QTimer')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Timer repetitivo (relógio)
label_clock = QLabel('00:00:00')
label_clock.setStyleSheet('font-size: 32px; font-family: monospace;')
layout.addWidget(label_clock)

timer_clock = QTimer()
timer_clock.timeout.connect(
    lambda: label_clock.setText(QTime.currentTime().toString('HH:mm:ss'))
)
timer_clock.start(1000)  # 1000ms = 1 segundo

# Exemplo 2: Timer com contagem regressiva
label_countdown = QLabel('Contagem: 10')
layout.addWidget(label_countdown)

countdown = [10]
timer_countdown = QTimer()

def update_countdown():
    countdown[0] -= 1
    label_countdown.setText(f'Contagem: {countdown[0]}')
    if countdown[0] <= 0:
        timer_countdown.stop()
        label_countdown.setText('Tempo esgotado!')
        print('Contagem finalizada!')

timer_countdown.timeout.connect(update_countdown)

def start_countdown():
    countdown[0] = 10
    label_countdown.setText('Contagem: 10')
    timer_countdown.start(1000)

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Iniciar Contagem', clicked=start_countdown))

# Exemplo 3: Timer de disparo único (singleShot)
def delayed_action():
    print('Ação executada após 3 segundos!')
    label_single.setText('Ação executada!')

label_single = QLabel('Esperando...')
layout.addWidget(label_single)

def trigger_single():
    label_single.setText('Aguarde 3s...')
    QTimer.singleShot(3000, delayed_action)  # 3000ms = 3 segundos

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Disparo Único (3s)', clicked=trigger_single))

# Exemplo 4: Controle de timer (start/stop)
label_counter = QLabel('Contador: 0')
layout.addWidget(label_counter)

counter = [0]
timer_counter = QTimer()
timer_counter.timeout.connect(lambda: (
    counter.__setitem__(0, counter[0] + 1),
    label_counter.setText(f'Contador: {counter[0]}')
))

def toggle_timer():
    if timer_counter.isActive():
        timer_counter.stop()
        btn_toggle.setText('Iniciar')
    else:
        timer_counter.start(100)  # 100ms
        btn_toggle.setText('Parar')

btn_toggle = QPushButton('Iniciar')
btn_toggle.clicked.connect(toggle_timer)
layout.addWidget(btn_toggle)

# Exemplo 5: Timer com intervalo variável
print('Métodos do QTimer:')
print(f'  .start(ms) - Inicia com intervalo em milissegundos')
print(f'  .stop() - Para o timer')
print(f'  .isActive() - Verifica se está rodando')
print(f'  .setInterval(ms) - Altera intervalo')
print(f'  .setSingleShot(True) - Disparo único')
print(f'  QTimer.singleShot(ms, callback) - Estático')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Métodos do QTimer:
  .start(ms) - Inicia com intervalo em milissegundos
  .stop() - Para o timer
  .isActive() - Verifica se está rodando
  .setInterval(ms) - Altera intervalo
  .setSingleShot(True) - Disparo único
  QTimer.singleShot(ms, callback) - Estático
(Janela com relógio, contagem, timer)
(Relógio: '14:30:45' atualiza a cada segundo)
(Contagem: 10...9...8...0 -> 'Tempo esgotado!')
(Disparo: após 3s imprime 'Ação executada após 3 segundos!')
(Contador: incrementa rapidamente ao clicar Iniciar)

import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QTabWidget,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QLineEdit,
                              QPushButton, QCheckBox)
from PyQt6.QtGui import QIcon

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('TabWidget')
window.resize(500, 400)
main_layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: TabWidget básico
tabs = QTabWidget()

# Aba 1 - Geral
tab1 = QWidget()
tab1_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab1)
tab1_layout.addWidget(QLabel('Aba Geral'))
tab1_layout.addWidget(QLineEdit())
tab1_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Botão na aba 1'))
tabs.addTab(tab1, 'Geral')

# Aba 2 - Configurações
tab2 = QWidget()
tab2_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab2)
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('Opção 1'))
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('Opção 2'))
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('Opção 3'))
tabs.addTab(tab2, 'Configurações')

# Aba 3 - Sobre
tab3 = QWidget()
tab3_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab3)
tab3_layout.addWidget(QLabel('App v1.0'))
tab3_layout.addWidget(QLabel('Feito com PyQt6'))
tabs.addTab(tab3, 'Sobre')

main_layout.addWidget(tabs)

# Exemplo 2: Eventos de aba
tabs.currentChanged.connect(lambda index: print(f'Aba alterada: {index} ({tabs.tabText(index)})'))

# Exemplo 3: Abas fecháveis
tabs.setTabsClosable(True)
tabs.tabCloseRequested.connect(lambda index: (
    print(f'Fechando aba: {tabs.tabText(index)}'),
    tabs.removeTab(index)
))

# Exemplo 4: Posição das abas
# tabs.setTabPosition(QTabWidget.TabPosition.South)  # Abaixo
# tabs.setTabPosition(QTabWidget.TabPosition.West)   # Esquerda
# tabs.setTabPosition(QTabWidget.TabPosition.East)   # Direita

# Exemplo 5: Controle programático
def add_new_tab():
    new_tab = QWidget()
    new_layout = QVBoxLayout(new_tab)
    new_layout.addWidget(QLabel(f'Nova aba {tabs.count() + 1}'))
    tabs.addTab(new_tab, f'Aba {tabs.count() + 1}')
    tabs.setCurrentWidget(new_tab)

btn_add = QPushButton('Adicionar Aba')
btn_add.clicked.connect(add_new_tab)
main_layout.addWidget(btn_add)

# Exemplo 6: Ir para aba específica
def goto_tab(index):
    if index < tabs.count():
        tabs.setCurrentIndex(index)

btn_first = QPushButton('Ir para Aba 1')
btn_first.clicked.connect(lambda: goto_tab(0))
main_layout.addWidget(btn_first)

print(f'Total de abas: {tabs.count()}')
print(f'Aba atual: {tabs.currentIndex()}')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria lista de itens selecionáveis com suporte a seleção múltipla
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QListWidget,
                              QListWidgetItem, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout,
                              QPushButton, QLineEdit, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ListWidget')
window.resize(400, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Lista básica
list_widget = QListWidget()
list_widget.addItem('Item 1')
list_widget.addItem('Item 2')
list_widget.addItem('Item 3')
list_widget.addItems(['Item 4', 'Item 5', 'Item 6'])
layout.addWidget(list_widget)

# Exemplo 2: Callback de seleção
label = QLabel('Selecionado: Nenhum')
layout.addWidget(label)

list_widget.currentItemChanged.connect(
    lambda current, previous: label.setText(f'Selecionado: {current.text() if current else "Nenhum"}')
)

# Exemplo 3: Duplo clique
list_widget.itemDoubleClicked.connect(
    lambda item: print(f'Duplo clique: {item.text()}')
)

# Exemplo 4: Adicionar e remover itens
input_layout = QHBoxLayout()
edit = QLineEdit()
edit.setPlaceholderText('Novo item...')
input_layout.addWidget(edit)

def add_item():
    text = edit.text().strip()
    if text:
        list_widget.addItem(text)
        edit.clear()

def remove_item():
    current = list_widget.currentRow()
    if current >= 0:
        item = list_widget.takeItem(current)
        print(f'Removido: {item.text()}')

input_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Adicionar', clicked=add_item))
layout.addLayout(input_layout)
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Remover Selecionado', clicked=remove_item))

# Exemplo 5: Seleção múltipla
list_multi = QListWidget()
list_multi.setSelectionMode(QListWidget.SelectionMode.MultiSelection)
list_multi.addItems(['Opção A', 'Opção B', 'Opção C', 'Opção D'])
list_multi.setMaximumHeight(100)
layout.addWidget(QLabel('Seleção Múltipla:'))
layout.addWidget(list_multi)

def show_selected():
    selected = [item.text() for item in list_multi.selectedItems()]
    print(f'Selecionados: {selected}')
    single = list_widget.currentItem()
    print(f'Single: {single.text() if single else "Nenhum"}')
    print(f'Total itens: {list_widget.count()}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Mostrar Seleção', clicked=show_selected))

# Exemplo 6: Ordenar e limpar
btn_layout = QHBoxLayout()
btn_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Ordenar', clicked=list_widget.sortItems))
btn_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Limpar', clicked=list_widget.clear))
layout.addLayout(btn_layout)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria tabela com linhas e colunas para exibição e edição de dados
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QTableWidget,
                              QTableWidgetItem, QVBoxLayout, QPushButton,
                              QHeaderView)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('TableWidget')
window.resize(600, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Tabela básica
table = QTableWidget(5, 4)  # 5 linhas, 4 colunas
table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(['Nome', 'Idade', 'Cidade', 'Email'])

# Popular dados
dados = [
    ['Ana Silva', '28', 'São Paulo', 'ana@email.com'],
    ['Pedro Costa', '35', 'Rio de Janeiro', 'pedro@email.com'],
    ['Maria Souza', '22', 'Curitiba', 'maria@email.com'],
    ['João Lima', '41', 'Recife', 'joao@email.com'],
    ['Julia Santos', '30', 'BH', 'julia@email.com']
]

for row, pessoa in enumerate(dados):
    for col, valor in enumerate(pessoa):
        item = QTableWidgetItem(valor)
        table.setItem(row, col, item)

layout.addWidget(table)

# Exemplo 2: Cabeçalho ajustável
table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch)
# Ou por coluna:
# table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(0, QHeaderView.ResizeMode.ResizeToContents)

# Exemplo 3: Seleção por linha inteira
table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectionBehavior.SelectRows)

# Exemplo 4: Célula somente leitura
item_readonly = QTableWidgetItem('Não editável')
item_readonly.setFlags(item_readonly.flags() & ~Qt.ItemFlag.ItemIsEditable)
table.setItem(0, 0, item_readonly)

# Exemplo 5: Callback de clique
def on_cell_click(row, col):
    item = table.item(row, col)
    if item:
        print(f'Célula ({row},{col}): {item.text()}')

table.cellClicked.connect(on_cell_click)

# Exemplo 6: Adicionar e remover linhas
def add_row():
    row = table.rowCount()
    table.insertRow(row)
    table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem('Novo'))
    table.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem('0'))
    table.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(''))
    table.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(''))

def remove_row():
    current = table.currentRow()
    if current >= 0:
        table.removeRow(current)

btn_add = QPushButton('Adicionar Linha', clicked=add_row)
btn_remove = QPushButton('Remover Linha', clicked=remove_row)
layout.addWidget(btn_add)
layout.addWidget(btn_remove)

# Exemplo 7: Obter dados
def get_all_data():
    for row in range(table.rowCount()):
        row_data = []
        for col in range(table.columnCount()):
            item = table.item(row, col)
            row_data.append(item.text() if item else '')
        print(f'Linha {row}: {row_data}')
    print(f'Total: {table.rowCount()} linhas, {table.columnCount()} colunas')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Obter Dados', clicked=get_all_data))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao esquecer de chamar super().__init__() em classes que herdam de QWidget
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication, QWidget, QMainWindow, QPushButton

app = QApplication(sys.argv)

# Exemplo 1: ERRO - esquecer super().__init__()
class WindowErrada(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        # FALTOU: super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('Vai dar erro')

try:
    w = WindowErrada()
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 1: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - com super().__init__()
class WindowCorreta(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()  # OBRIGATÓRIO
        self.setWindowTitle('Funciona!')

try:
    w = WindowCorreta()
    print(f'Janela criada: {w.windowTitle()}')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 2: {e}')

# Exemplo 3: ERRO - QApplication não existe
try:
    # Se QApplication não foi criada
    # widget = QWidget()
    print('QApplication deve existir antes de criar widgets')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 3: {e}')

# Exemplo 4: ERRO - duas QApplications
try:
    # app2 = QApplication(sys.argv)  # Segunda instância
    print('Apenas uma QApplication permitida')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 4: {e}')

# Exemplo 5: Causas comuns
print('\nCausas comuns de RuntimeError no PyQt6:')
print('  1. Esquecer super().__init__() em classes herdadas')
print('  2. Criar widget sem QApplication existente')
print('  3. Criar segunda instância de QApplication')
print('  4. Acessar widget destruído')
print('  5. Thread tentando acessar GUI')
print('\nSolução: Sempre chamar super().__init__() no __init__')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Erro 1: super-class __init__() of type WindowErrada was never called
Janela criada: Funciona!
QApplication deve existir antes de criar widgets
Apenas uma QApplication permitida

Causas comuns de RuntimeError no PyQt6:
  1. Esquecer super().__init__() em classes herdadas
  2. Criar widget sem QApplication existente
  3. Criar segunda instância de QApplication
  4. Acessar widget destruído
  5. Thread tentando acessar GUI

Solução: Sempre chamar super().__init__() no __init__

commands.cmdName: Erro: Acessar GUI de Thread secundária
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao tentar modificar widgets fora da thread principal
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
import threading
import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QProgressBar)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QThread, pyqtSignal, QObject, QTimer

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Threading')
window.resize(400, 300)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

label = QLabel('Status: Pronto')
layout.addWidget(label)
progress = QProgressBar()
layout.addWidget(progress)

# Exemplo 1: ERRADO - Modificar GUI da thread
def wrong_thread():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            # ERRADO: acessar widget da thread secundária
            try:
                label.setText(f'Progresso: {i}%')  # CRASH!
            except RuntimeError as e:
                print(f'Erro thread: {e}')
                return
            time.sleep(0.05)
    threading.Thread(target=task).start()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('ERRADO (Thread)', clicked=wrong_thread))

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - QThread com Signals
class Worker(QObject):
    progress_changed = pyqtSignal(int)
    status_changed = pyqtSignal(str)
    finished = pyqtSignal()
    
    def run(self):
        self.status_changed.emit('Processando...')
        for i in range(101):
            self.progress_changed.emit(i)
            time.sleep(0.03)
        self.status_changed.emit('Concluído!')
        self.finished.emit()

def correct_thread():
    thread = QThread()
    worker = Worker()
    worker.moveToThread(thread)
    
    thread.started.connect(worker.run)
    worker.progress_changed.connect(progress.setValue)
    worker.status_changed.connect(label.setText)
    worker.finished.connect(thread.quit)
    worker.finished.connect(worker.deleteLater)
    thread.finished.connect(thread.deleteLater)
    
    thread.start()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('CORRETO (QThread)', clicked=correct_thread))

# Exemplo 3: CORRETO - QTimer.singleShot na thread principal
def timer_approach():
    progress.setValue(0)
    step = [0]
    
    def update():
        step[0] += 1
        progress.setValue(step[0])
        label.setText(f'Timer: {step[0]}%')
        if step[0] < 100:
            QTimer.singleShot(30, update)
        else:
            label.setText('Timer concluído!')
    
    update()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('CORRETO (QTimer)', clicked=timer_approach))

print('Regras de threading PyQt6:')
print('  1. NUNCA modificar widgets de threads secundárias')
print('  2. Usar QThread + Worker + Signals para tarefas longas')
print('  3. Signals são thread-safe (entregues na thread do receptor)')
print('  4. QTimer para tarefas curtas periódicas')
print('  5. moveToThread() move QObject para outra thread')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

  2. Usar QThread + Worker + Signals para tarefas longas
  3. Signals são thread-safe (entregues na thread do receptor)
  4. QTimer para tarefas curtas periódicas
  5. moveToThread() move QObject para outra thread
(Botão ERRADO: causa RuntimeError ou crash silencioso)
(Botão CORRETO QThread: barra progride suavemente 0-100%)
(Botão CORRETO QTimer: barra progride sem thread separada)

commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class LabelApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Label simples
        lbl1 = Label(text='Texto Simples')
        layout.add_widget(lbl1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Label com tamanho de fonte
        lbl2 = Label(text='Fonte Grande', font_size='32sp')
        layout.add_widget(lbl2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Label com cor
        lbl3 = Label(
            text='Texto Colorido',
            color=(1, 0.2, 0.3, 1)  # RGBA (0-1)
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Label com markup
        lbl4 = Label(
            text='[b]Negrito[/b] [i]Itálico[/i] [color=ff0000]Vermelho[/color]',
            markup=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Label com quebra de linha
        lbl5 = Label(
            text='Texto longo que será quebrado automaticamente em várias linhas',
            text_size=(300, None),  # Largura fixa, altura auto
            halign='left',
            valign='top'
        )
        lbl5.bind(texture_size=lbl5.setter('size'))
        layout.add_widget(lbl5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Label com alinhamento
        lbl6 = Label(
            text='Centralizado',
            size_hint=(1, None),
            height=50,
            halign='center',
            valign='middle'
        )
        lbl6.bind(size=lbl6.setter('text_size'))
        layout.add_widget(lbl6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: Label com fundo (usando canvas)
        from kivy.graphics import Color, Rectangle
        lbl7 = Label(text='Com Fundo', size_hint=(1, None), height=50)
        with lbl7.canvas.before:
            Color(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1)  # Azul
            lbl7._bg = Rectangle(pos=lbl7.pos, size=lbl7.size)
        lbl7.bind(pos=lambda inst, val: setattr(inst._bg, 'pos', val))
        lbl7.bind(size=lambda inst, val: setattr(inst._bg, 'size', val))
        layout.add_widget(lbl7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: Label com fonte customizada
        lbl8 = Label(
            text='Fonte Mono',
            font_name='RobotoMono-Regular',  # ou caminho para .ttf
            font_size='18sp'
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl8)
        
        return layout

LabelApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botão clicável com texto e eventos de toque
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class ButtonApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Botão básico
        btn1 = Button(text='Clique Aqui')
        btn1.bind(on_press=lambda x: print('Botão pressionado!'))
        layout.add_widget(btn1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Botão com callback
        def on_click(instance):
            print(f'Botão "{instance.text}" clicado!')
            instance.text = 'Clicado!'
        
        btn2 = Button(text='Com Callback')
        btn2.bind(on_press=on_click)
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Botão com on_release
        btn3 = Button(text='Press & Release')
        btn3.bind(
            on_press=lambda x: print('Pressionou'),
            on_release=lambda x: print('Soltou')
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Botão com tamanho fixo
        btn4 = Button(
            text='Tamanho Fixo',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(200, 60),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Botão com cores
        btn5 = Button(
            text='Colorido',
            background_color=(0.9, 0.2, 0.3, 1),  # Vermelho
            color=(1, 1, 1, 1),  # Texto branco
            font_size='20sp',
            bold=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Botão sem fundo padrão
        btn6 = Button(
            text='Sem Background',
            background_normal='',
            background_color=(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: Botão desabilitado
        btn7 = Button(
            text='Desabilitado',
            disabled=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: Botão que altera label
        self.label = Label(text='Nenhum clique')
        layout.add_widget(self.label)
        
        counter = [0]
        def count_click(instance):
            counter[0] += 1
            self.label.text = f'Cliques: {counter[0]}'
        
        btn8 = Button(text='Contar Cliques')
        btn8.bind(on_press=count_click)
        layout.add_widget(btn8)
        
        return layout

ButtonApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria campo de entrada de texto com suporte a multilinha
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class TextInputApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: TextInput básico
        ti1 = TextInput(hint_text='Digite seu nome...')
        ti1.size_hint_y = None
        ti1.height = 40
        layout.add_widget(ti1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: TextInput multilinha
        ti2 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Texto multilinha...',
            multiline=True,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=100
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: TextInput de linha única (Enter confirma)
        ti3 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Linha única (Enter confirma)',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        ti3.bind(on_text_validate=lambda inst: print(f'Enter: {inst.text}'))
        layout.add_widget(ti3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: TextInput para senha
        ti4 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Senha',
            password=True,
            password_mask='*',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: TextInput somente leitura
        ti5 = TextInput(
            text='Somente leitura',
            readonly=True,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: TextInput com estilo
        ti6 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Estilizado',
            background_color=(0.1, 0.1, 0.2, 1),
            foreground_color=(0, 1, 0.5, 1),
            cursor_color=(1, 0, 0, 1),
            hint_text_color=(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1),
            font_size='18sp',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=45
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: TextInput com filtro numérico
        ti7 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Apenas números',
            input_filter='int',  # 'int', 'float', ou callable
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: TextInput com evento de mudança
        self.label_count = Label(text='Caracteres: 0', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.label_count)
        
        ti8 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Digite e veja a contagem',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        ti8.bind(text=lambda inst, val: setattr(
            self.label_count, 'text', f'Caracteres: {len(val)}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(ti8)
        
        # Exemplo 9: Obter e limpar
        def get_and_clear(instance):
            print(f'ti1: "{ti1.text}"')
            print(f'ti4 (senha): "{ti4.text}"')
            print(f'ti7 (número): "{ti7.text}"')
            ti1.text = ''  # Limpar
        
        btn = Button(text='Obter e Limpar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=get_and_clear)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        return layout

TextInputApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Organiza widgets em linha horizontal ou coluna vertical
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class BoxLayoutApp(App):
    def build(self):
        # Exemplo 1: Layout vertical (padrão)
        root = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Layout horizontal dentro do vertical
        h_layout = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                             size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Esquerda'))
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Centro'))
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Direita'))
        root.add_widget(h_layout)
        
        # Exemplo 3: size_hint para proporções
        h_layout2 = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                              size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='25%', size_hint_x=0.25))
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='50%', size_hint_x=0.50))
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='25%', size_hint_x=0.25))
        root.add_widget(h_layout2)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Tamanho fixo (sem size_hint)
        h_layout3 = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                              size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout3.add_widget(Button(text='Fixo 100px',
                                     size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        h_layout3.add_widget(Button(text='Expande'))  # Ocupa o resto
        root.add_widget(h_layout3)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Padding e spacing
        padded = BoxLayout(
            orientation='vertical',
            padding=[20, 10, 20, 10],  # left, top, right, bottom
            spacing=15,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=150
        )
        padded.add_widget(Button(text='Com Padding'))
        padded.add_widget(Button(text='E Spacing'))
        root.add_widget(padded)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Layouts aninhados
        nested = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                           size_hint_y=None, height=100)
        
        left_col = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=5)
        left_col.add_widget(Button(text='A1'))
        left_col.add_widget(Button(text='A2'))
        nested.add_widget(left_col)
        
        right_col = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=5)
        right_col.add_widget(Button(text='B1'))
        right_col.add_widget(Button(text='B2'))
        nested.add_widget(right_col)
        
        root.add_widget(nested)
        
        # Exemplo 7: Adicionar e remover widgets
        self.dynamic_layout = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal',
                                        spacing=5, size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        root.add_widget(self.dynamic_layout)
        
        btn_add = Button(text='Adicionar', size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        btn_add.bind(on_press=self.add_widget_dynamic)
        root.add_widget(btn_add)
        
        btn_remove = Button(text='Remover', size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        btn_remove.bind(on_press=self.remove_widget_dynamic)
        root.add_widget(btn_remove)
        
        return root
    
    counter = 0
    def add_widget_dynamic(self, instance):
        self.counter += 1
        self.dynamic_layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'#{self.counter}'))
    
    def remove_widget_dynamic(self, instance):
        children = self.dynamic_layout.children
        if children:
            self.dynamic_layout.remove_widget(children[0])

BoxLayoutApp().run()

commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.gridlayout import GridLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput

class GridApp(App):
    def build(self):
        # Exemplo 1: Grid com colunas fixas
        root = GridLayout(cols=2, padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Formulário com grid
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Nome:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, hint_text='Seu nome'))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Email:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, hint_text='Seu email'))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Senha:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, password=True))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text=''))  # Espaçador
        root.add_widget(Button(text='Enviar'))
        
        return root

# Exemplo 3: Calculadora com grid
class CalcApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(cols=4, spacing=5, padding=10)
        
        botoes = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/',
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-',
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]
        
        for texto in botoes:
            btn = Button(
                text=texto,
                font_size='24sp',
                bold=True
            )
            btn.bind(on_press=lambda inst: print(f'Tecla: {inst.text}'))
            layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        return layout

# Exemplo 4: Grid com linhas fixas
class GridRowsApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(rows=3, spacing=5, padding=10)
        for i in range(9):
            layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'Item {i+1}'))
        return layout

# Exemplo 5: Grid com tamanhos mínimos
class GridMinApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(
            cols=3,
            spacing=10,
            padding=10,
            row_default_height=60,
            row_force_default=True,
            col_default_width=120,
            col_force_default=True
        )
        for i in range(9):
            layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'Fixo {i+1}'))
        return layout

CalcApp().run()

commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.floatlayout import FloatLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class FloatApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = FloatLayout()
        
        # Exemplo 1: Posição absoluta
        btn1 = Button(
            text='Absoluto (50, 50)',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(150, 50),
            pos=(50, 50)
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Posição relativa com pos_hint
        btn2 = Button(
            text='Centro',
            size_hint=(0.3, 0.1),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'center_y': 0.5}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Cantos
        btn3 = Button(
            text='Topo Direito',
            size_hint=(0.2, 0.08),
            pos_hint={'right': 1, 'top': 1}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn3)
        
        btn4 = Button(
            text='Inferior Esq',
            size_hint=(0.2, 0.08),
            pos_hint={'x': 0, 'y': 0}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn4)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Label centralizado
        lbl = Label(
            text='FloatLayout',
            font_size='28sp',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(200, 50),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'top': 0.95}
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Botão que se move
        self.moving_btn = Button(
            text='Me Mova',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(120, 40),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'center_y': 0.3}
        )
        self.moving_btn.bind(on_press=self.move_button)
        layout.add_widget(self.moving_btn)
        
        return layout
    
    def move_button(self, instance):
        import random
        instance.pos_hint = {
            'center_x': random.uniform(0.1, 0.9),
            'center_y': random.uniform(0.1, 0.9)
        }
        print(f'Movido para: {instance.pos_hint}')

FloatApp().run()

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.screenmanager import ScreenManager, Screen
from kivy.uix.screenmanager import SlideTransition, FadeTransition
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class TelaInicio(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Tela Inicial', font_size='28sp'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Ir para Configurações', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.go_config)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        btn2 = Button(text='Ir para Sobre', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn2.bind(on_press=self.go_about)
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        self.add_widget(layout)
    
    def go_config(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = SlideTransition(direction='left')
        self.manager.current = 'config'
    
    def go_about(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = FadeTransition()
        self.manager.current = 'about'

class TelaConfig(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Configurações', font_size='28sp'))
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Opções aqui...'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Voltar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.go_back)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        self.add_widget(layout)
    
    def go_back(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = SlideTransition(direction='right')
        self.manager.current = 'inicio'

class TelaSobre(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Sobre', font_size='28sp'))
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='App v1.0\nFeito com Kivy'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Voltar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self.manager, 'current', 'inicio'))
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        self.add_widget(layout)

class ScreenApp(App):
    def build(self):
        sm = ScreenManager()
        sm.add_widget(TelaInicio(name='inicio'))
        sm.add_widget(TelaConfig(name='config'))
        sm.add_widget(TelaSobre(name='about'))
        
        print(f'Telas: {sm.screen_names}')
        print(f'Tela atual: {sm.current}')
        
        return sm

ScreenApp().run()

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.properties import StringProperty

# Exemplo 1: KV string básica
KV = '''
BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: 20
    spacing: 10
    
    Label:
        text: 'Interface em KV Language'
        font_size: '24sp'
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
    
    TextInput:
        id: nome_input
        hint_text: 'Digite seu nome'
        multiline: False
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 40
    
    Button:
        text: 'Saudar'
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
        on_press: resultado.text = f'Olá, {nome_input.text}!'
    
    Label:
        id: resultado
        text: 'Aguardando...'
        font_size: '20sp'
'''

class KVApp(App):
    def build(self):
        return Builder.load_string(KV)

KVApp().run()

# Exemplo 2: KV com classe customizada
KV2 = '''
<MeuWidget>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: 15
    spacing: 10
    
    Label:
        text: root.titulo
        font_size: '22sp'
        color: 0.2, 0.6, 1, 1
    
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
        spacing: 5
        
        Button:
            text: 'Botão 1'
            on_press: root.on_btn(1)
        
        Button:
            text: 'Botão 2'
            on_press: root.on_btn(2)
    
    Label:
        id: status
        text: root.status_text

MeuWidget:
'''

class MeuWidget(BoxLayout):
    titulo = StringProperty('Widget Customizado')
    status_text = StringProperty('Nenhum botão clicado')
    
    def on_btn(self, num):
        self.status_text = f'Botão {num} clicado!'
        print(f'Botão {num} pressionado')

class KV2App(App):
    def build(self):
        return Builder.load_string(KV2)

# Exemplo 3: KV com canvas (desenho)
KV3 = '''
BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    
    Label:
        text: 'Com Canvas'
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
    
    Widget:
        canvas:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 1, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
            Color:
                rgba: 1, 0.3, 0.3, 1
            Ellipse:
                pos: self.center_x - 50, self.center_y - 50
                size: 100, 100
'''

# === main.py ===
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty

class RootWidget(BoxLayout):
    counter = NumericProperty(0)
    status = StringProperty('Pronto')
    
    def increment(self):
        self.counter += 1
        self.status = f'Contagem: {self.counter}'
        print(f'Contador: {self.counter}')
    
    def reset(self):
        self.counter = 0
        self.status = 'Resetado!'

# Nome da classe App determina nome do arquivo .kv

class MeuApp(App):
    def build(self):

commands.cmdDescription: Propriedades observáveis que atualizam automaticamente a interface ao mudar
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.properties import (
    StringProperty, NumericProperty, BooleanProperty,
    ListProperty, DictProperty, ObjectProperty,
    BoundedNumericProperty, OptionProperty, AliasProperty
)

class MyWidget(BoxLayout):
    # Exemplo 1: StringProperty
    nome = StringProperty('Sem nome')
    
    # Exemplo 2: NumericProperty
    contador = NumericProperty(0)
    
    # Exemplo 3: BooleanProperty
    ativo = BooleanProperty(False)
    
    # Exemplo 4: ListProperty
    itens = ListProperty([])
    
    # Exemplo 5: DictProperty
    config = DictProperty({'tema': 'dark', 'font_size': 14})
    
    # Exemplo 6: BoundedNumericProperty (com limites)
    volume = BoundedNumericProperty(50, min=0, max=100)
    
    # Exemplo 7: OptionProperty (valores permitidos)
    modo = OptionProperty('normal', options=['normal', 'turbo', 'eco'])
    
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.orientation = 'vertical'
        self.padding = 10
        self.spacing = 10
        
        self.label = Label(text=f'Nome: {self.nome}')
        self.add_widget(self.label)
        
        self.label_count = Label(text=f'Contador: {self.contador}')
        self.add_widget(self.label_count)
        
        self.label_status = Label(text=f'Ativo: {self.ativo}')
        self.add_widget(self.label_status)
        
        # Botões
        btn_name = Button(text='Mudar Nome', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_name.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'nome', 'João'))
        self.add_widget(btn_name)
        
        btn_count = Button(text='Incrementar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_count.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'contador', self.contador + 1))
        self.add_widget(btn_count)
        
        btn_toggle = Button(text='Toggle Ativo', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_toggle.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'ativo', not self.ativo))
        self.add_widget(btn_toggle)
        
        # Bind para observar mudanças
        self.bind(nome=self.on_nome_changed)
        self.bind(contador=self.on_contador_changed)
        self.bind(ativo=self.on_ativo_changed)
    
    # Exemplo 8: Callbacks de mudança
    def on_nome_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label.text = f'Nome: {value}'
        print(f'Nome alterado para: {value}')
    
    def on_contador_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label_count.text = f'Contador: {value}'
        print(f'Contador: {value}')
    
    def on_ativo_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label_status.text = f'Ativo: {value}'
        print(f'Ativo: {value}')
    
    # Exemplo 9: Callback automático (on_<property>)
    def on_volume(self, instance, value):
        print(f'Volume: {value}')
    
    def on_modo(self, instance, value):
        print(f'Modo: {value}')

class PropApp(App):
    def build(self):
        widget = MyWidget()
        
        # Exemplo 10: Alterar property externamente
        widget.nome = 'Maria'
        widget.itens.append('item1')
        widget.config['tema'] = 'light'
        widget.volume = 75
        widget.modo = 'turbo'
        
        # Exemplo 11: Erro - valor fora do range
        try:
            widget.volume = 150  # Max é 100
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f'Erro: {e}')
        
        # Exemplo 12: Erro - opção inválida
        try:
            widget.modo = 'invalido'
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f'Erro: {e}')
        
        print(f'\nItens: {widget.itens}')
        print(f'Config: {widget.config}')
        
        return widget

PropApp().run()

Erro: 150 is not allowed for volume
Erro: 'invalido' is not allowed for modo
